contract.dual: media.right + max(0, computed column gap - tolerance) <= copy.left + tolerance
contract.single: media.bottom + max(0, computed row gap - tolerance) <= copy.top + tolerance
contract.containment: media and copy horizontal rects stay within hero rect

zoomEquivalent.evidenceBoundary: Playwright equivalent CSS viewports; native browser zoom was not programmatically changed; deviceScaleFactor remained the CLI context value.
